brand.name: CAS Incubator OS
brand.tagline: Build Ideas. Shape Projects. Launch Impact.

hero.title: Build Ideas. Shape Projects. Launch Impact.
hero.subtitle: An AI-powered project-based learning platform that guides students from problem discovery to real-world solutions.

features.h2: Built for the Next Generation of Builders

landing.disclaimer: This platform is currently in development. See our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

overview.title: Admin Overview
overview.body: Top-level snapshot of every program, cohort, user, and class code in CAS Incubator OS. Super admins land here to spot growth and capacity issues before drilling into individual records.

analytics.title: Program Analytics
analytics.body: Cross-program KPIs covering enrollment, project stage distribution, risk flags, and AI usage. Use this to brief leadership or decide where coaching support is needed.

aiUsage.title: AI Usage & Cost
aiUsage.body: Per-route token spend, daily volume trend, and top consumers across all Anthropic calls. Check this when reviewing bills or investigating a sudden cost spike.

programs.title: Programs
programs.body: The catalog of incubator programs you offer. Create or archive programs here, then attach cohorts, checkpoints, and curriculum to each one.

programDetail.title: Program Detail
programDetail.body: Everything attached to one program — description, length, and the cohorts running it. Add a new cohort here to start a fresh class under this program.

newProgram.title: New Program
newProgram.body: Create a brand-new incubator program. Give it a clear name and duration so teachers can attach cohorts to it later.

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.body: Every class group ever run. Each cohort holds the students, teachers, mentors, and class codes for one cycle of a program.

cohortDetail.title: Cohort Detail
cohortDetail.body: Roster, class codes, and assigned staff for a single cohort. Drop in here to add a teacher, regenerate a code, or check enrollment health.

newCohort.title: New Cohort
newCohort.body: Start a new class group under an existing program. Set start/end dates and a roster cap so class codes can enforce it.

classCodes.title: Class Codes
classCodes.body: Generate, pause, or revoke the join codes students use to enter a cohort. Each code is scoped to one cohort and can be capped or expired.

users.title: Users
users.body: Every account in the system across roles. Search to debug a missing student, promote a teacher to admin, or audit who joined when.

projects.title: All Projects
projects.body: Every student project across every cohort, with filters for live products and demos. Use this when judging the showcase or auditing program-wide output.

worksheets.title: Worksheet Templates
worksheets.body: The library of worksheet templates teachers can assign to students. Create reusable forms here so the same prompt works across cohorts.

newWorksheet.title: New Worksheet Template
newWorksheet.body: Build a new worksheet by adding fields and instructions. Once active it appears in every teacher's assignment picker.

editWorksheet.title: Edit Worksheet Template
editWorksheet.body: Change fields, instructions, or scoring. Updates apply to new assignments — already-submitted entries keep their original schema.

rubrics.title: Rubric Templates
rubrics.body: Reusable scoring rubrics that mentors and teachers apply when reviewing work. Edit centrally so every cohort grades on the same criteria.

newRubric.title: New Rubric
newRubric.body: Define criteria, weights, and rating scale labels for a new rubric. It will be available to every reviewer once saved.

editRubric.title: Edit Rubric
editRubric.body: Tweak criteria, weights, or scale labels. Past evaluations keep their original snapshot.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoint Templates
checkpoints.body: Define program milestones — which worksheets and rubrics must be complete before a student progresses. The student journey is built from these.

newCheckpoint.title: New Checkpoint
newCheckpoint.body: Create a new milestone. Pick which worksheets and rubrics must be in place for a student to clear it.

editCheckpoint.title: Edit Checkpoint
editCheckpoint.body: Adjust the required worksheets, rubrics, or activation status for this milestone.

curriculum.title: Curriculum Library
curriculum.body: Every lesson asset — slides, PDFs, videos, links — that students, teachers, and mentors can pull up. Set visibility per role to control who sees what.

curriculumLesson.title: Lesson
curriculumLesson.body: View, print, or open the source for a single curriculum asset. Use the side navigation to jump between lessons.

notes.title: Mentor Notes — All Cohorts
notes.body: The latest mentor session notes across every student. Escalations bubble to the top so admins can intervene quickly.

commsQueue.title: Communications Queue
commsQueue.body: Parent updates drafted by teachers and mentors awaiting your approval before being emailed. Approve, reject, or edit before they go out.

risks.title: Risk Flags
risks.body: Every student risk flag raised by staff or AI, filterable by severity and status. Use this to triage which students need urgent attention.

riskDetail.title: Risk Flag Detail
riskDetail.body: The full story of one risk — who raised it, why, and what's been resolved. Reassign or close the flag from here.

showcases.title: Showcases
showcases.body: Every student showcase, with a quick view of which are publicly shared. Drop in to leave program-level feedback.

showcaseDetail.title: Showcase Detail
showcaseDetail.body: The student's showcase plus all received feedback. Add your own review notes from here.

methodStages.title: Method Stages
methodStages.body: Configure the named research and project stages students move through. Reorder, rename, or add new stages to evolve the methodology.

projectTypes.title: Project Types
projectTypes.body: The categories projects can be classified into (e.g. social, hardware, software). Used by AI classification and reporting.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.body: Global configuration for CAS Incubator OS. Most program-specific settings live under each program; this page handles platform-wide defaults.

overview.title: Teacher Dashboard
overview.body: Your at-a-glance view of the cohorts you teach — what needs review, who needs a nudge, and where your students are in the method pipeline.

teachingMode.title: Teaching Mode
teachingMode.body: Pick today's lesson and teach with the same standard every time. Each lesson opens a teaching page with the plan, the worksheets to push to your class, the rubric, and any checkpoints due near it.

teachingModeLesson.title: Teach this Lesson
teachingModeLesson.body: Everything for one class period in one place — the lesson plan, the worksheets to assign, the rubric for grading, and the checkpoints due near this lesson. The breadcrumb at top shows your method stage and the next checkpoint; the right rail shows the full 20-lesson timeline so you always know where this class sits in the bigger arc.

students.title: Your Students
students.body: Every student in the cohorts you teach. Click in to see their project, worksheet history, and method progress in one place.

studentDetail.title: Student Profile
studentDetail.body: Everything you need to coach this student — their project, all worksheets, method progress, and quick links to flag risks or message parents.

projects.title: Student Projects
projects.body: All active projects in your cohorts. Use this to spot stalled stages and decide who to call into office hours.

projectDetail.title: Project Detail
projectDetail.body: Deep view of one student's project — problem statement, MVP, work links, and method-stage status. Leave a mentor note or raise a risk flag from here.

assignments.title: Worksheet Assignments
assignments.body: Assign worksheets to a single student or a whole cohort, set due dates, and track who's still pending. Send reminders to nudge late submissions.

assignmentDetail.title: Assignment Detail
assignmentDetail.body: Submission status for one assignment, with per-student rows. Remind, extend the deadline, or close the assignment from here.

worksheets.title: Worksheets
worksheets.body: Every worksheet template available to assign, plus your cohort's progress on each. Click a template to preview it or open the cohort breakdown.

worksheetPreview.title: Worksheet Preview
worksheetPreview.body: See exactly what a student sees when they open this worksheet. Useful before assigning to verify wording and field types.

worksheetCohort.title: Cohort Worksheet Progress
worksheetCohort.body: Per-student progress on a single worksheet across the cohort — who's submitted, who needs revision, and who hasn't started.

worksheetReview.title: Worksheet Review Queue
worksheetReview.body: Submissions waiting for your review. Work through the queue to approve, request revision, or leave feedback for each entry.

worksheetReviewDetail.title: Review Submission
worksheetReviewDetail.body: Read the student's submission, check it against the rubric, and approve or request revisions. AI can draft initial feedback to save you time.

rubrics.title: Rubrics
rubrics.body: Scoring rubrics available when you review work. Use them to keep grading consistent across students and cohorts.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Curriculum assets — lessons, slides, templates — that you and your students can reference. Filtered to what admins have made visible to teachers.

resourceDetail.title: Resource
resourceDetail.body: View a single curriculum asset. Use the navigation to jump between lessons or open the source file.

parents.title: Parent Communications
parents.body: Send progress updates to parents and review past communications. AI drafts the message and an admin approves it before sending.

parentsCompose.title: Compose Parent Update
parentsCompose.body: Draft a progress update for this student's parent or guardian. The platform pulls in their project context so you don't start from scratch.

parentsHistory.title: Parent Update History
parentsHistory.body: Every update sent to this student's parent, with status (draft, pending, sent). Reuse a previous draft as a starting point.

showcases.title: Student Showcases
showcases.body: Showcases your students have published. Click in to leave feedback that helps them iterate before final demo day.

showcaseDetail.title: Showcase
showcaseDetail.body: Review one student's showcase end to end and leave structured feedback. Your comments appear on the student's review tab.

risks.title: Risk Flags
risks.body: Risk flags raised on your students. Use this to triage who needs intervention — escalate, reassign, or mark resolved as you act.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.body: Program-wide milestones. Each checkpoint requires specific worksheets and rubric scores before a student progresses to the next stage.

overview.title: Mentor Dashboard
overview.body: What's on your plate today — projects awaiting review and your latest session notes. Start your mentoring session from here.

projects.title: Projects to Mentor
projects.body: Every project you're mentoring across cohorts. Click in to leave session notes, evaluate work, or flag a concern.

projectDetail.title: Project Detail
projectDetail.body: Full view of a mentee's project — problem statement, MVP, links, and stage progress. Leave a session note or raise a risk flag from here.

worksheetReview.title: Worksheet Review Queue
worksheetReview.body: Worksheet submissions assigned to you for review. Work through them to give feedback and unblock the student's next stage.

worksheetReviewDetail.title: Review Submission
worksheetReviewDetail.body: Read the submission, score it, and approve or request revisions. AI can draft initial feedback to speed you up.

rubricEvaluate.title: Rubric Evaluation
rubricEvaluate.body: Pick a project, choose a rubric, and score against it criterion-by-criterion. Your weighted score plus comments save back to the project.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoint Review Queue
checkpoints.body: Student checkpoint submissions awaiting your sign-off. Approving here unlocks the next stage of their journey.

checkpointDetail.title: Checkpoint Review
checkpointDetail.body: All worksheets and artifacts attached to one checkpoint submission. Approve, request revision, or escalate from here.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Curriculum assets you can reference during mentoring sessions — slide decks, frameworks, and reference docs.

notes.title: My Mentor Notes
notes.body: Every session note you've left, across all your mentees. Use it to recap before a session or look back on a student's growth arc.

parents.title: Parent Communications
parents.body: Send updates to your mentees' parents. Drafts go to admin for approval before being emailed.

parentsCompose.title: Compose Parent Update
parentsCompose.body: Write a parent update for this mentee. The platform pre-loads their project context so you can focus on the message.

parentsHistory.title: Parent Update History
parentsHistory.body: All updates ever sent to this mentee's parent, with status. Reuse a past draft to keep tone consistent.

showcases.title: Mentee Showcases
showcases.body: Showcases from students you've mentored. Drop feedback to help them sharpen the story before demo day.

showcaseDetail.title: Showcase
showcaseDetail.body: Review your mentee's showcase end to end and leave structured feedback for them to iterate on.

risks.title: Risk Flags
risks.body: Risk flags assigned to you for follow-up. Take action — reach out to the student, leave a note, then mark the flag resolved.

overview.title: Your Dashboard
overview.body: Welcome back. Here's what to do next — pending worksheets, your current method stage, and the cohort you're part of.

intake.title: Intake Form
intake.body: A quick set of questions so we can set up your project workspace. Your answers help your teacher tailor support to your goals.

project.title: My Project
project.body: Your project home — problem statement, MVP definition, and links to your live work. Update it as your idea evolves.

method.title: Method Pipeline
method.body: Your 10-stage learning journey from problem discovery to launch. Each stage unlocks once your mentor approves the previous one.

methodStage.title: Method Stage
methodStage.body: What this stage is about, the questions to think through, and the evidence to submit. Save your notes and submit when you're ready for review.

worksheets.title: Worksheets
worksheets.body: Worksheets your teacher has assigned to you. Pick one up where you left off, review past submissions, or see what's next.

worksheetDetail.title: Worksheet
worksheetDetail.body: Fill in this worksheet and submit when you're done. Your answers save as a draft until you hit submit.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.body: Major milestones in your project. Each checkpoint requires a few worksheets and a mentor sign-off — clearing one unlocks the next.

checkpointDetail.title: Checkpoint
checkpointDetail.body: Everything you need to submit for this checkpoint. Once you've completed all required pieces, submit for mentor review.

showcase.title: My Showcase
showcase.body: Your public-facing project page — share it with parents, friends, or judges. Toggle public sharing once you're happy with how it reads.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Lessons, templates, and reference materials shared by your teacher. Use them when you're stuck or want to go deeper.

resourceDetail.title: Resource
resourceDetail.body: A single lesson or asset. Use the navigation to move between lessons or open the original file.

overview.title: Parent Dashboard
overview.body: Welcome. Here's a summary of your child's progress and the latest updates we've sent you about their work in the program.

updates.title: Updates Inbox
updates.body: Every progress update we've sent about your child, in one place. Tap any update to read the full message.

updateDetail.title: Update
updateDetail.body: The full text of one update from your child's teacher or mentor. Reach out via email if you have questions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.placeholder: Settings will be available in a future update.

join.title: Join CAS Incubator OS
join.subtitle: Enter the class code your teacher gave you.
join.codeHint: Format: CAS-INC-XXXX-YYYY (your teacher will share it)
join.unauthMessage: Sign in or create an account to join with class code:
join.studentDesc: I'm participating in the incubator program.
join.parentDesc: I want to follow my child's progress.
join.consentLabel: I confirm that parental consent has been obtained for this student. By checking this box, I acknowledge the student is either 18 or older, or parental/guardian consent has been provided.
join.parentConsentLabel: I confirm I am the parent or guardian of the student named above.
join.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
join.consentRequired: You must confirm parental consent to continue.
join.codePaused: This class code is currently paused.

student.noCohort: You're not enrolled in any cohort yet.

helperText.liveProduct: Where can people use it? Paste your deployed product link.
helperText.demoVideo: YouTube, Loom, or any video link showing your product in action.
helperText.slides: Google Slides, Canva, or any slide deck link.
helperText.github: Paste your repository link — your code lives here.
helperText.figma: Share your design mockups or wireframes.
helperText.screenshots: Upload screenshots or files from your project.

method.title: Method Pipeline
method.subtitle: Your learning journey through 10 research and project stages.

projects.title: Student Projects
projects.empty: No projects found in your cohorts.

worksheets.noStageYet: Your teacher will move you to a stage to unlock worksheets.
worksheets.completeIntake: Complete your intake to start seeing worksheets.

risks.noneAssigned: No open risk flags assigned to you.

showcase.publicOn: Anyone with the link can view your showcase
showcase.publicOff: Only you and program staff can see this

parentUpdate.subject: Update on {studentName}'s Progress
parentUpdate.footer: This update is about {studentName}'s progress in the CAS Incubator program.

assignments.noWorksheetsLinked: No worksheets linked to this lesson.

todo.title: Your To-Do
todo.noPending: No pending assignments. You're all caught up!

worksheetAssigned.subject: New worksheet assigned: {title} — Due {date}
worksheetAssigned.body: Your teacher {teacher} has assigned you a new worksheet to complete.

worksheetReminder.subject: Reminder: {title} due in {dueIn}
worksheetReminder.body: You have a worksheet due soon. Don't forget to complete and submit it.
